title: draba × blyttii
intro: Draba × blyttii, also known as Blytt's draba, is a rare and unique alpine plant species that is a natural hybrid of Draba alpina and Draba norvegica. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Draba × blyttii is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
